evals.prompt: Add AG-UI / CopilotKit support to our ADK agent main.go — we already have webui and webapi launchers.
evals.expected_output: webagui import, webagui.NewLauncher with neuron service id and WithCORS inside web.NewLauncher
assertions: Service id matches infra neuron not llmagent name only
Proto imports for scheduler and history Spanner tables when threads are used
User asked to run define after proto edits

evals.prompt: Wire the ag-ui SSE endpoint so our frontend can talk to the agent; neuron id is in infra locals.
evals.expected_output: agui sublauncher wired with correct service id from infra
assertions: Does not use add-tool or add-lro flows
Both scheduler.proto and history.proto imports when Spanner tables needed

evals.prompt: We have a bare ADK agent with only universal.NewLauncher — no webui, no webapi, nothing else. Add AG-UI support from scratch so we can connect a CopilotKit frontend.
evals.expected_output: webagui.NewLauncher inside web.NewLauncher, proto imports for Spanner tables, agui CLI arg in deployment config
assertions: Service id sourced from infra config
Both scheduler.proto and history.proto proto imports added
agui added to Dockerfile CMD and Cloud Run args
